name: goalbuddy
description: Turn broad Codex work into verified GoalBuddy boards with Scout, Judge, Worker, receipts, and optional extensions.

interface.shortDescription: Turn broad Codex work into verified Scout/Judge/Worker boards
interface.longDescription: GoalBuddy packages a structured Codex goal workflow for broad, long-running, or ambiguous engineering work. It creates durable goal charters, task boards, receipts, verification gates, extension handoffs, and compatibility guidance for teams moving from goal-maker.
defaultPrompt: $goal-prep prepare a GoalBuddy board for this goal
